name: linResetScopeTrigger
title: linResetScopeTrigger
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by the function scopeTriggerNow.
Resets the oscilloscope trigger condition(s) defined with linSetScopeTrigger. Note If this function is called from on-preStart part of the CAPL-program, then this function will have no effect.
Note If this function is called from on-preStart part of the CAPL-program, then this function will have no effect.
Note If this function is called from on-preStart part of the CAPL-program, then this function will have no effect.
On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
